holdings.infoBox: MUSQ is an equity ETF with a total of 35 individual holdings. The top holdings are Live Nation Entertainment stock at 12.26%, Universal Music Group at 10.04%, Spotify Technology at 9.47%, Tencent Music Entertainment Group at 6.41%, and Madison Square Garden Entertainment at 5.67%.

overview.description: The MUSQ Global Music Industry Index ETF (MUSQ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MUSQ Global Music Industry index. The fund selects and weights its holdings based on market capitalization, of companies tied to the global music industry. Components are publicly traded companies and royalty funds with a core business interest in the music industry. MUSQ was launched on Jul 6, 2023 and is issued by MUSQ.
